creator: nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de
text:
On Mon, Jul 31, 2006 at 03:20:21AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of emulators/qemu,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/101074 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/101074

To the originator:  I have an update for qemu 0.8.2 in the works
where i can't reproduce your problem.  Could you please try the
update posted at
	http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?20060725174719.GA16116
and see if it fixes it for you too?

 Thanx,
	Juergen (maintainer)
